name: ascii-diagram
description: >- Generate perfectly aligned ASCII diagrams — architecture, flow, sequence, box-and-arrow. Uses a programmatic character-grid approach so alignment is guaranteed by math, not token prediction. Includes post-render verification.
author: SethGammon
summary_zh: 这是一个基于数学计算生成完美对齐字符图表的工具，彻底解决AI画图容易错位的问题，非常适合在纯文本文档里绘制架构图、流程图或时序图。
